data.name: Agent Horny - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
Content and Features in Agent Horny - Season 1

  • Renders: 4700+ (4K Resolution)

  • Animations: 77 (4K Resolution)

  • Words: 29 000+

  • Music: 60 Songs (no moaning sounds)

  • Female Characters: 14 (expand the description for more info and renders)

  • Hidden gallery: 100 bonus renders

  • Gallery for the sex scenes

  • Play time: 5.5 Hours

    *Playtime is tested while playing in 'auto' mode in Ren'Py, which, for most people, is enough time to read and take a quick look at the images. If you spend time 'enjoying' the sex scenes, it will take longer. If you read faster or skip directly to the sex scenes, it will be shorter.

    Fetishes:

  • Seduction, Romance

  • Corruption, Domination, Submission, Light Bondage

  • MILF - Handjob- Blowjob - Vaginal - Threesome - Facial - Creampie - Footjob

    Story:

    Agent Horny is an adult visual novel that follows the story of a strong, dominant, and uncompromising agent who uses his physical strength, combat skills, and intellect to fight crime and his charm to seduce beautiful women.

    While unraveling the plot of some powerful and brutal people, MC will have to decide how far he is willing to go to stop them. Alongside the main plot, there will be side stories that provide insight into his work and personal life. Through subtle clues and flashbacks, you will gradually uncover the main character's past and how it has shaped him into the person he is today.

    Buy this game if:

    - You want to experience a blend of a porn game with an action/crime storyline, featuring both humorous/cool and serious/dark themes.
    - You enjoy playing as a skilled, confident, and dominant main character with a dark and complicated past that you will slowly unravel.
    - You like a VN with great renders and animations.
    - You want to seduce many female characters and develop a variety of relationships with them, some focused on romance/seduction and others on domination/submission/corruption.

    This game is not for you if:

    - You want to play a weak/mediocre main character.
    - You enjoy games with lots of choices. (You can pick what outfits female characters will wear in some scenes, there are also choices in the sex scenes, but the story itself is linear.)
    - You prefer games where 90% of the story revolves around the dating aspect.

    Let me introduce you the female characters currently in the game:

    Lily: Cute one-night stand with hidden potential.
    Lt. Katie Cassidy: A busty police lieutenant that just arrived in the city.
    Grace Williams: A young woman beginning her journey of becoming an FBI agent.
    Virginia: The 19yo daughter of one of MC's colleagues.
    SAC Olivia Harper: Head of the FBI regional office, secretly torn between her work and her forbidden feelings for the main character.
    Mary Jane: She is a criminal unlucky enough to have stumbled upon our hero.
    The Maid: An open-minded young woman working as a maid.
    Claire: You will find more about her in the game.
    Sarah Connolly: You will find more about her in the game.
    Isabella Castillo: You will find more about her in the game.
    Detective Elisa: You will find more about her in the game.
    CIA Director Victoria Blake: You will find more about her in the game.​
    Sienna: You will find more about her in the game.​ Ashley: You will find more about her in the game.​

data.short_description: Agent Horny is an adult visual novel that follows the story of a strong, dominant, and uncompromising agent who uses his physical strength, combat skills, and intellect to fight crime and his charm to seduce beautiful women. The choices in this game are limited, check the description for more info.
data.reviews:
“Whomever named this AVN did it a great disservice. It sounds like a corny amateurish production when in fact the graphic quality and attention to detail of the images is among the best I've seen. The story is gripping and a bit dark. The main character is sort of a mix of The Punisher and James Bond with a backstory like the Punisher. The only complaint I have is the amount of clicking as you go from image to image during lewd scenes before animation kicks in. Otherwise this is a first rate AVN worth playing.”
Steam

“i give this visual novel a big thumbs up, the story is very enjoyable and makes you want to keep reading until the end. the renders are beautiful. the girls are also very beautiful to look at. the animations could be a bit better but they are certainly not bad. i hope for a new season soon. thanks to the dev's keep it up :heart174:”
Steam

“Agent Horny is a lewd kinetic novel where you basically play as an American James Bond. The story is short but it has some really well made scenes throughout, and nothing is missable because you can always choose to play the other scenes as well, when there is a choice. At several points you can choose an outfit for one of the females to wear during the next scene. There is a bit of replayability in finding the hidden gallery images, but other than that it is a straight story. The various settings keep it interesting, though.”
Steam

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 onwards
  • 處理器: CPU: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit (Intel / AMD)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
